description_long: This is a small, rectangular green juice carton with Chinese text and colorful graphics on its exterior. The front features a cartoonish illustration of a young man in a hat and red pants, along with a prominent white and black logo and a yellow information box. The sides display nutritional information, barcodes, and certification logos, while the top is sealed and printed with a production date and additional branding. The packaging appears to be made of laminated paperboard, typical for single-serve juice containers, and is slightly crumpled, suggesting it has been handled. The bottom of the carton shows a color calibration strip and more printed details. The overall design is vibrant and playful, targeting a youthful audience.
description: A small, green rectangular juice carton with Chinese branding, cartoon graphics, and nutritional information panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main logo, cartoon character, and a yellow information box.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the barcode, nutritional panel, and part of the cartoon character.
description_view_2: Top view with production date, branding, and a green band running across the seal.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large block of nutritional text and certification logos.
